resources.string: Front palm
Left oblique
Right oblique
Up tilt
Down tilt
Place your palm toward the camera and keep the card near the ring finger.
Rotate your hand slightly left while keeping the ring finger visible.
Rotate your hand slightly right and keep the card in frame.
Tilt your hand upward to reveal finger thickness.
Tilt your hand downward for the final angle.
Place your hand in frame.
Place the card near your finger.
Adjust hand pose.
Hold your hand steady.
Move hand into frame more clearly.
Rotate hand more to the left.
Rotate hand more to the right.
Tilt hand upward more.
Tilt hand downward more.
Face your palm directly to the camera.
